title: 10 best herbal teas for chickenpox
description: Plantago major, also known as plantain, teas helps with chickenpox because it contains anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. These properties help to reduce the severity of symptoms, such as itching and fever, associated with chickenpox. The tea's anti-inflammatory compounds also aid in reducing the risk of secondary infections, which can develop in the skin blisters caused by the virus.
